languages.text: {n}В этот момент последнее святое рушится внутри. Остальные слишком потрясены, чтобы обратить внимание, куда вы ступаете. Но здесь и сейчас вы совершили последнее богохульство — на сей раз не только против Бога-Императора, но и против всего порядка Империума. Даже династия больше ничего для вас не значит — не больше, чем инструмент возвышения.{/n}

{n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В этот момент последнее святое рушится внутри. Остальные слишком потрясены, чтобы обратить внимание, куда вы ступаете. Даже династия больше ничего для вас не значит — не больше, чем инструмент возвышения.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在这一刻，你内心最后一点神圣感彻底崩塌。旁人震惊得甚至没注意到你踩在什么上面。但在此时此地，你犯下了终极的亵渎之罪。这一次不仅是对神皇，更是对整个帝国秩序的背叛。就连这个王朝，对你来说也不再有任何意义——它不过是你实现个人野心的工具罢了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在这一刻，你内心最后一点神圣感彻底崩塌。旁人震惊得甚至没注意到你踩在什么上面。但在此时此地，你犯下了终极的亵渎之罪。这一次不仅是对神皇，更是对整个帝国秩序的背叛。就连这个王朝，对你来说也不再有任何意义——它不过是你实现个人野心的工具罢了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}En este momento, lo último sagrado que quedaba en tu interior se desmorona. Los demás están demasiado conmocionados como para fijarse dónde pisas, pero, en este momento, acabas de cometer la blasfemia definitiva, no solo contra el Dios Emperador sino contra el mismo orden establecido del Imperium. Ya no te importa ni siquiera la dinastía. Es solo otra herramienta para tus ambiciones.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En este momento, lo último sagrado que quedaba en tu interior se desmorona. Los demás están demasiado conmocionados como para fijarse dónde pisas, pero, en este momento, acabas de cometer la blasfemia definitiva, no solo contra el Dios Emperador sino contra el mismo orden establecido del Imperium. Ya no te importa ni siquiera la dinastía. Es solo otra herramienta para tus ambiciones.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En cet instant, le sentiment ténu de respect que vous éprouviez encore pour le sacré s'évanouit définitivement. Les autres sont trop choqués pour remarquer où vous marchez, mais c'est ici que vous avez commis l'ultime blasphème. Non pas envers l'Empereur-Dieu cette fois, mais envers l'ordre lui-même de l'Imperium. Même la dynastie ne signifie plus rien à vos yeux. Il ne s'agit plus que d'un outil au service de vos ambitions.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En cet instant, le sentiment ténu de respect que vous éprouviez encore pour le sacré s'évanouit définitivement. Les autres sont trop choqués pour remarquer où vous marchez, mais c'est ici que vous avez commis l'ultime blasphème. Non pas envers l'Empereur-Dieu cette fois, mais envers l'ordre lui-même de l'Imperium. Même la dynastie ne signifie plus rien à vos yeux. Il ne s'agit plus que d'un outil au service de vos ambitions.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İçindeki son kutsal şey de parçalanıyor. Diğerleri, nereye bastığını bile fark edemeyecek kadar şokta. Ancak şu anda; bu kez sadece Tanrı İmparator'a değil, İmparatorluk'un bizzat düzenine karşı nihai küfür işlemiş oluyorsun. Hanedan bile artık senin için hiçbir şey ifade etmiyor... O sadece kendi hırsların için kullandığın bir araçtan ibaret.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İçindeki son kutsal şey de parçalanıyor. Diğerleri, nereye bastığını bile fark edemeyecek kadar şokta. Ancak şu anda; bu kez sadece Tanrı İmparator'a değil, İmparatorluk'un bizzat düzenine karşı nihai küfür işlemiş oluyorsun. Hanedan bile artık senin için hiçbir şey ifade etmiyor... O sadece kendi hırsların için kullandığın bir araçtan ibaret.{/n}

languages.text: {n}In diesem Moment schwindet der letzte Funke Heiligkeit in dir. Die anderen sind zu schockiert, um zu bemerken, was du tust. Du hast hier und jetzt die finale Blasphemie begangen, dieses Mal allerdings nicht nur gegen den Gottimperator, sondern gegen die Ordnung des Imperiums selbst. Auch die Dynastie bedeutet dir nichts mehr ... Sie ist nichts als ein Werkzeug für deine eigenen Ziele.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In diesem Moment schwindet der letzte Funke Heiligkeit in dir. Die anderen sind zu schockiert, um zu bemerken, was du tust. Du hast hier und jetzt die finale Blasphemie begangen, dieses Mal allerdings nicht nur gegen den Gottimperator, sondern gegen die Ordnung des Imperiums selbst. Auch die Dynastie bedeutet dir nichts mehr ... Sie ist nichts als ein Werkzeug für deine eigenen Ziele.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この瞬間、あなたの中に残された最後の聖なるものも崩れ去る。他の人たちはショックで、あなたの足跡に気づいていない。しかし今、あなたは最後の冒涜を犯した。神帝だけでなく、帝国そのものの秩序にまで。もはや王朝はあなたにとって意味を持たない。それは単なるあなたの野望のための道具に過ぎない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In this moment, the last sacred thing within you crumbles. The others are too shocked to even notice where you tread. But here and now, you have committed the final blasphemy, this time not only against the God-Emperor but against the very order of the Imperium. Even the dynasty no longer means anything to you — it is no more than a tool for your own ambitions.{/n}
